title: Terramar Brands Product Catalog
description: Normalized product catalog scraped from the Terramar Brands WCF API. Each item represents a product variant with SKU, pricing, department, descriptions, and media links.

sku.title: SKU
sku.description: Product SKU code from the clave field (unique per variant)

name.title: Product Name
name.description: Product name in Spanish from the producto field

price.title: Price (MXN)
price.description: Price in MXN parsed from the precio string field (range 170-1670)

departmentId.title: Department ID
departmentId.description: Department code 1-10 from the departamento field

department.title: Department
department.description: Department name resolved from /getDeptos lookup (e.g. Color, Fragancias)

subdepartmentId.title: Subdepartment ID
subdepartmentId.description: Subdepartment code from the subdepartamento field

subdepartment.title: Subdepartment
subdepartment.description: Subdepartment name resolved from /getDeptos secciones (e.g. Rostro, Él)

description.title: Description
description.description: Product description with HTML tags stripped, from the descripcion field
description.example: Brinda al cutis una apariencia perfecta. Ideal para todo tipo de piel.

application.title: Application Instructions
application.description: Application/usage instructions with HTML stripped, from the aplicacion field
application.example: Pasar la esponja en el compacto.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.description: Ingredients info with HTML stripped, from the ingredientes field

olfactiveFamily.title: Olfactive Family
olfactiveFamily.description: Olfactory family for fragrances (empty for most products, 4/225 have values)

imageUrls.title: Image URLs
imageUrls.description: Product image URLs: primary from webImagesBaseUrl (/shopping-cart/color/{clave}.jpg), fallback from imagen field

fichaTecnica.title: Technical Data Sheet
fichaTecnica.description: URL to the product technical data sheet PDF from webImagesBaseUrl fichasTecnicas path

hasCarousel.title: Has Image Carousel
hasCarousel.description: Whether the product has an image carousel (carrusel=S, true for 95/225 products)

variantClass.title: Variant Class
variantClass.description: Variant/shade class number from clase field (30/225 products have values)

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Product catalog overview showing key identifiers, classification, pricing, and links.
